description: Environment setup - install dependencies and verify existing build and test baseline is green
steps: Run `npm install` in the workspace root /projects/sandbox/innovation-sandbox-on-aws
Run `npm run build` to verify typecheck passes on the existing codebase
Run `npm test` to verify all existing tests pass
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` (tsc --noEmit across all workspaces) exits with code 0
findings: All green. NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset before running npm commands (points to missing /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js). npm install, build, and test all pass without issues. 6 audit vulnerabilities noted but do not affect functionality.
